form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 401m at this track behind Dollar Keeping beaten 10 lengths (23.52) in a Maiden. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 401m at this track behind Dollar Keeping beaten 10 lengths (23.52) in a Maiden. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Badly checked at the 1st turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (26.21) over 457m at Temora. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (26.21) over 457m at Temora. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior was just edged out when second (30.06) at big odds over 515m at The Gardens. Tough draw to overcome but capable of a better result.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior was just edged out when second (30.06) at big odds over 515m at The Gardens. Tough draw to overcome but capable of a better result.

form.formComment: Stepping out over 520m for the first time. Out of the placings in recent runs, most recently when fourth over 320m at this track. Hasn't done enough of late to inspire confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Stepping out over 520m for the first time. Out of the placings in recent runs, most recently when fourth over 320m at this track. Hasn't done enough of late to inspire confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the first turn hampered off the back, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after 13 starts, the most recent effort a sixth (43.98) over 720m at Wentworth Park. Returns to a favoured course. Rates highly and is the one to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has ability but remains a maiden after 13 starts, the most recent effort a sixth (43.98) over 720m at Wentworth Park. Returns to a favoured course. Rates highly and is the one to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start broke down over 520m at this track,. Prefer to watch at this stage.
